name: YNX Resource Market
title: YNX Resource Market — Verifiable Infrastructure Capacity
metaDescription: Review provider evidence, compare infrastructure capacity, meter real usage and verify settlement state on the YNX test network.
h1: Infrastructure capacity with evidence from quote to settlement
risks: Provider availability and performance can vary
Test-network assets have no guaranteed value
Settlement is final only when authoritative receipt evidence is confirmed
structuredDataRecommendation: SoftwareApplication with WebApplication applicationCategory; add FAQPage only when the published FAQ text exactly matches visible content

faq.question: Does a quote reserve or pay for capacity?
faq.answer: No. Quote, intent, reservation, service, metering and asset settlement are separate states.

faq.question: Can YNX AI purchase infrastructure?
faq.answer: No. AI may explain quotes and forecast usage, but it cannot reserve capacity, sign, pay or settle.

faq.question: How are providers paid?
faq.answer: Only measured usage that reconciles to authoritative settlement evidence can become a confirmed receipt.
